pred_reason: The contract contains multiple arithmetic operations without overflow protection (SWC-101) and violates checks-effects-interactions pattern by transferring funds before state updates (SWC-107). These vulnerabilities enable integer manipulation and reentrancy attacks that could drain all contract funds. Evidence: Integer overflow/underflow in processKick(), setShares(), and kickerCount increments without SafeMath; pullShares(), clear(), and airDrop() transfer ETH before updating state variables; Multiple .transfer() calls lack success checks, risking locked funds after state changes

findings.Issue: Reentrancy vulnerability in fund transfer functions
findings.Description: Multiple functions transfer ETH before updating state variables, violating checks-effects-interactions pattern. Issue appears in the smart contract code only.
findings.Impact: Complete drainage of contract funds through recursive reentrancy attacks, theft of all player deposits and winnings
findings.Location: pullShares() function (line ~184), clear() function (line ~283), airDrop() function (line ~196)

findings.Issue: Integer overflow/underflow vulnerabilities in arithmetic operations
findings.Description: Multiple arithmetic operations performed without overflow protection. Issue appears in the smart contract code only.
findings.Impact: Incorrect token/share calculations, potential fund loss or manipulation, contract state corruption
findings.Location: processKick() function, setShares() function, storeWinnerShare() function, kickerCount increments

findings.Issue: Insecure access control mechanisms
findings.Description: Multiple functions lack proper access control, including unrestricted ownership transfer and unprotected critical functions. Issue appears in the smart contract code only.
findings.Impact: Unauthorized fund transfers, contract manipulation, privilege escalation, permanent contract control takeover
findings.Location: changeOwner(), changeHouseAddress(), WithdrawFromKickTheCoin.release(), setKtcAddress() functions

findings.Issue: Unchecked external calls with potential fund loss
findings.Description: Multiple .transfer() calls without success/failure checking. Issue appears in the smart contract code only.
findings.Impact: Permanent fund loss when transfers fail after state changes, locked contract balances, failed payouts to legitimate recipients
findings.Location: pullShares(), airDrop(), clear(), release() functions across all contracts

findings.Issue: Front-running vulnerability in commission reward mechanism
findings.Description: Predictable first and second kicker rewards create economic incentive for front-running. Issue appears in the smart contract code only.
findings.Impact: Commission rewards systematically captured by front-runners, unfair playing field, reduced legitimate participation
findings.Location: processKick() function (lines ~237-250), setShares() function (lines ~224-232)

findings.Issue: Block number manipulation vulnerability in game timing
findings.Description: Game logic relies on block.number for critical timing mechanisms. Issue appears in the smart contract code only.
findings.Impact: Miners could influence game outcomes, manipulation of sundown grace period timing, unfair advantage to miner-participants
findings.Location: kickTheCoin(), isGameActive(), sundown(), clear() functions using block.number comparisons

findings.Issue: Incorrect winner share calculation and distribution
findings.Description: storeWinnerShare() function incorrectly awards entire pot to last player instead of proper commission distribution. Issue appears in the smart contract code only.
findings.Impact: Unfair distribution depriving legitimate commission recipients, undermines game economic model, potential financial losses
findings.Location: storeWinnerShare() private function

findings.Issue: State transition race condition vulnerability
findings.Description: Non-atomic state transition between game phases allows manipulation. Issue appears in the smart contract code only.
findings.Impact: Legitimate winners denied winnings, attackers can reset game to prevent payouts, funds can be locked
findings.Location: kickTheCoin(), hasWinner(), isGameActive() functions interaction

findings.Issue: Missing input validation for critical parameters
findings.Description: Multiple functions lack zero-address validation and parameter bounds checking. Issue appears in the smart contract code only.
findings.Impact: Critical addresses could be set to zero permanently locking funds, game parameters could be set to unreasonable values
findings.Location: changeOwner(), changeHouseAddress(), changeGameParameters(), airDrop() functions

findings.Issue: Unbounded array growth in factory contract
findings.Description: Arrays grow indefinitely without pagination or limits. Issue appears in the smart contract code only.
findings.Impact: Potential gas limit issues, degraded performance, inability to retrieve complete system information
findings.Location: KickTheCoinFactory games array and founderToCreatedGames mapping
